name: Whisper MCP Server
what_it_does: OpenAI Whisper MCP server enabling AI agents to transcribe audio and speech — converting audio files to text using OpenAI's Whisper model (locally or via API), processing audio from various formats (MP3, WAV, M4A, etc.), and integrating speech transcription capabilities into agent-driven workflows for meeting notes, podcast processing, voice command capture, and audio content analysis.
use_cases: Transcribing audio recordings and meetings from note-taking agents
Converting voice memos to text from personal productivity agents
Processing podcast episodes for content indexing from content agents
Enabling voice command input for agent workflows from voice-interface agents
Transcribing customer calls or interviews from analysis agents
Captioning video content by extracting and transcribing audio from media agents
not_for: Real-time live transcription (Whisper processes pre-recorded audio, not live streams)
Speaker diarization without additional tools (Whisper doesn't identify who spoke)
Translation beyond what Whisper supports natively
best_when: An agent needs to process audio content — transcribing recordings, meeting notes, or voice memos into text for further analysis or storage.
avoid_when: You need real-time streaming transcription — use Google Speech-to-Text streaming or AWS Transcribe Streaming for live audio. Whisper is batch-oriented.

auth.notes: OpenAI API key for cloud Whisper (api.openai.com). No auth for local Whisper model. Set OPENAI_API_KEY for cloud mode. Local mode requires whisper Python package and model download.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free with local Whisper model (GPU recommended); OpenAI API: $0.006/minute
pricing.paid_tiers: OpenAI Whisper API: $0.006/minute; local is free
pricing.notes: Run locally for free (requires local GPU/CPU for inference). OpenAI cloud API is $0.006/minute — a 1-hour recording costs $0.36. Very affordable.

performance.rate_limits: OpenAI API rate limits for cloud; local is rate-limit-free

known_agent_gotchas: Large audio files require significant processing time — implement appropriate timeouts
Local model requires initial download (tiny: 75MB, large: 1.5GB) — plan for first-run delay
Transcription accuracy varies by audio quality, accent, and background noise
Cloud Whisper sends audio to OpenAI — evaluate data sensitivity for confidential recordings
Format support varies — ensure audio is in supported format before sending
Local Whisper on CPU is very slow — GPU strongly recommended for production use
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local mode: audio never leaves machine. Cloud mode: audio sent to OpenAI — consider sensitivity of recordings (meetings, calls, interviews). HTTPS for cloud mode. OpenAI API key for cloud.

security_score_components.security_notes: Cloud mode sends audio to OpenAI — assess sensitivity. Local mode is private. Audio may contain PII (voice, names, conversations). HTTPS for cloud.
